# SWMM 5.2.4 license note

EPA SWMM is produced by the United States Environmental Protection Agency (US EPA).
As a work of the United States federal government, the SWMM source code is in the
public domain (17 U.S.C. §105) and is distributed by EPA without copyright restriction.

Upstream source: https://github.com/USEPA/Stormwater-Management-Model (develop branch).
The vendored snapshot under `extern/swmm5/` is unmodified upstream source; see
`third_party/manifest/swmm5.version` for the extraction record and
`extern/swmm5/UPSTREAM_README.md` for the upstream readme.
